name: PolicyForgeScan
description: Scan Terraform/Bicep/Kubernetes IaC against PolicyForge policy-as-code rule packs and publish SARIF results.
author: PolicyForge contributors

inputs.name: path
inputs.label: Path to scan
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the directory of IaC files to scan.

inputs.name: policyDir
inputs.label: Custom policy directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional path to a directory of additional user-authored .rego policy files.

inputs.name: failOnHigh
inputs.label: Fail the build on HIGH/CRITICAL findings
